_doc: Closed taxonomy for the Casebook Battle System. Single source of truth for tags. Adding a tag requires a Code artifact and an update to scripts/systems/battle/effectiveness.gd's tag set assertions. Removing a tag is a save-migration concern.

article_tags._doc: Convention articles (ECHR primary, Polish constitutional secondary). Each tag is namespaced: 'echr_<n>' or 'pl_const_<n>'. Use the smallest set that supports the chapter being authored.
article_tags.echr_3: Prohibition of torture / inhuman or degrading treatment
article_tags.echr_8: Right to respect for private and family life, home, and correspondence
article_tags.echr_9: Freedom of thought, conscience, and religion
article_tags.pl_const_31: Protection of freedom; principle of proportionality
article_tags.pl_const_45: Right to a fair and public hearing
article_tags.pl_const_47: Right to private and family life
article_tags.pl_const_77: Right to compensation for unlawful state action

principle_tags._doc: Doctrinal principles invoked by judgments and moves. Same principle can attach to multiple Articles. Keep the list short; new principles require a real referent in the chapter being authored.
principle_tags.proportionality: Whether the interference is proportionate to the legitimate aim
principle_tags.individual_assessment: Requirement to assess the individual case on its facts
principle_tags.procedural_fairness: Adequate procedural safeguards in the decision-making process
principle_tags.access_to_court: Practical and effective access to a tribunal (Golder line)
principle_tags.equality_of_arms: Both parties have equivalent procedural footing
principle_tags.effective_remedy: A remedy must exist in fact, not only on paper
principle_tags.legal_certainty: Law must be foreseeable and accessible
principle_tags.non_discrimination: Differential treatment without objective and reasonable justification is prohibited
principle_tags.positive_obligations: State must take positive steps, not only refrain from interfering
principle_tags.margin_of_appreciation: Domestic authorities have latitude within limits
principle_tags.prescribed_by_law: Interference must have a basis in domestic law
principle_tags.legitimate_aim: Interference must serve one of the listed aims
principle_tags.necessity_in_democracy: Interference must be necessary in a democratic society
principle_tags.service_of_process: Notice and proper service (doręczenie zastępcze and analogues)
principle_tags.abuse_of_rights: Article 17 reasoning; restricts misuse of Convention rights

context_tags._doc: Factual context. The same Principle in a different Context lands differently. Keep contexts concrete and case-shaped.
context_tags.family_life: Relations between family members; contact, custody, immigration
context_tags.fair_trial: Court proceedings; hearing rights; presumption of innocence
context_tags.administrative: Administrative law; KPA procedure; permits, licences, sanctions
context_tags.service_failure: Defective notice, missed delivery, postal theatre
context_tags.documentary: Evidence is paper-bound; missing or mishandled documents
context_tags.deadline: Time-limit pressure; calendars, KPC time periods

effectiveness_buckets._doc: Five narrative buckets. Resolver in scripts/systems/battle/effectiveness.gd maps a numeric score to one of these.
